overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxury modern apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, ascending from a lower level to an upper floor with panoramic views of Night City, then exploring the living and bedroom areas with detailed object inspection.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment lower level with dining area and staircase

events.description: ascending the staircase, bright natural light becomes visible at the top

agents.ego_description: walking from the lower living area toward and up the wooden staircase

entered.detail: dark wood dining table with magazines and papers scattered on top
large red and black abstract artwork on the wall
wide wooden stairs with dark metal railing leading to upper floor
transparent glass panel railing along the left side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the lower level of a luxury apartment, showing a dining area with a wooden table and abstract art. The camera moves steadily toward and begins ascending a wide wooden staircase, with artificial interior lighting gradually giving way to bright natural light visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper living area with panoramic city views and fitness equipment

events.description: emerging from enclosed staircase into bright upper level with panoramic windows
holographic UI overlays appear on the window glass displaying data

agents.ego_description: walking along the panoramic windows admiring the Night City skyline and luxury interior furnishings

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows offering unobstructed views of the city
modern black treadmill positioned facing the window
blue translucent digital interface projected onto the window glass
modern white upholstered chair with wooden frame
tall cylindrical red decorative vase next to the lounge chair
futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper floor, the space opens into a bright, sunlit living area with floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows revealing the sprawling Night City skyline. The camera moves along the window wall past a treadmill and modern lounge furniture, with holographic UI elements visible on the glass. The transition from enclosed artificial lighting to expansive natural light marks a dramatic shift in atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: living area with white sectional sofa and panoramic city views

events.description: turning left to follow the curve of the window wall toward the sofa area
moving from the main living area toward the bedroom and storage area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the panoramic window past the white sectional sofa, viewing the neon billboards and cityscape

entered.detail: large white modern sectional sofa with clean lines facing the view
circular glass coffee table in front of the sofa
tall building with large pink and purple holographic advertisements
yellow and red surfboard leaning against the wall
dark wood cabinet with white doors and open shelving

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the expansive window wall, revealing a white sectional sofa and round coffee table positioned to maximize the city view. The iconic neon holographic billboards of Night City dominate the skyline outside. As the camera pans, it transitions toward the bedroom area where a decorative surfboard and modern storage cabinet come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: master bedroom with platform bed and detailed object inspection

events.description: turning away from the main window toward the interior bedroom space
slowing to inspect the coffee table objects including magazines and bottles

agents.ego_description: exploring the bedroom area and examining the objects on the coffee table including comic magazines and whiskey bottles

entered.detail: low-profile modern bed with white linens and dark headboard
dark wood coffee table cluttered with magazines, bottles, and glasses
comic books and magazines spread across the table surface
whiskey bottle and other liquor bottles on the coffee table

segments.scene_description: Moving into the more enclosed bedroom area, the camera leaves the panoramic windows behind to focus on the interior details. A platform bed with white linens sits against the wall, while a black coffee table in the foreground holds scattered comic magazines, whiskey bottles, and drinking glasses. The camera slows to inspect these personal items, ending with a close-up view of the cluttered table surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the intimate, artificially lit lower level of a luxury apartment into a bright, expansive upper floor overlooking a futuristic metropolis. It begins in a dining area with a wooden table and abstract art, moving steadily up a wide wooden staircase as the interior lighting gradually gives way to brilliant natural light. As the camera emerges onto the upper floor, the space opens into a sunlit living area where floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows reveal the sprawling Night City skyline and holographic UI elements. The scene then glides past modern lounge furniture and a white sectional sofa toward the bedroom, shifting the focus from the neon-dominated horizon to the interior's private quarters. Finally, the camera leaves the panoramic views behind to enter the enclosed bedroom, slowing its pace to inspect a platform bed and a cluttered black coffee table scattered with comic magazines and whiskey bottles.
